name: Cure Light Wounds
description: 1d6+1hp healed or cure paralysis
reversed: Cause Light Wounds: inflict 1d6+1hp damage on successful attack

name: Detect Evil
description: Evil objects and creatures with evil intentions glow

name: Detect Magic
description: Magic objects, areas, and enchantments glow

name: Light
description: 15′ radius light; can also blind one target or dispel darkness
reversed: Darkness: 15′ radius magical darkness; blinds target on failed SV vs Spells

name: Protection from Evil
description: +1 AC and saves vs evil creatures; blocks enchanted creature contact

name: Purify Food and Water
description: Makes spoiled, rotten, poisonous, or otherwise contaiminated food or water suitable for consumption
aoe: 6 quarts liquid, 1 preserved ration, or fresh food for 12 people.
reversed: Putrefy Food and Water: spoil food and water in area

name: Remove Fear
description: Remove fear; magical fear: +1 per caster level to SV vs Spells
reversed: Cause Fear: target flees for 2 turns; SV vs Spells Negates

name: Resist Cold
description: All in range: unharmed by normal cold; save +2, –1 damage per die vs magical cold

name: Bless
description: Allies in area: +1 attack rolls, damage rolls, and morale checks
reversed: Blight: –1 attack rolls, damage rolls, and morale checks if Spells SV failed.

name: Find Traps
description: Areas and objects trapped mechanically or magically glow blue
aoe: One object or area at a time

name: Hold Person
description: Paralyse 1 target (SV –2) or 1d4 targets; SV Negates

name: Know Alignment
description: Reveals the alignment of 1 creature, object, or location

name: Resist Fire
description: 1 target: unharmed by normal heat, save at +2, and –1 damage per die vs fire

name: Silence 15′ Radius
description: Area becomes silent; casting becomes impossible; those inside can hear outside

name: Snake Charm
description: Charm snakes with HD up to caster level; hostile snakes: rounds, neutral: turns
aoe: Snakes with HD up to and including caster level

name: Speak with Animals
description: Speak with one type of animal, giant or ordinary; reaction roll unaffected

name: Continual Light
description: Permanent 30′ radius light; can blind one target or dispel magical darkness
reversed: Continual Darkness: permanent 30′ radius magical darkness, prevents normal sight and infravision.

name: Cure Disease
description: Cure any disease or kill green slime on contact
aoe: 1 creature or patch of green slime
reversed: Cause Disease: infect target creature with a wasting disease: To Hit -2, half natural healing, magical healing ineffective, death within 2d12 days

name: Growth of Animal
description: One animal doubles in size; damage and max load also ×2

name: Locate Object
description: Sense direction (not distance) to nearest of an object type or specific known object

name: Remove Curse
description: Remove one curse from a creature
reversed: Bestow Curse (on a creature): -2 to saving throws, -4 to hit, ability score halved; SV vs Spells Negates

name: Striking
description: 1 weapon deals +1d6 damage and counts as magical

name: Create Water
description: Create 50 gallons of water (+50/level above 8th), enough for 12 humans and 12 mounts

name: Cure Serious Wounds
description: 2d6+2hp healed; excess healing is lost
reversed: Cause Serious Wounds: inflict 2d6+2hp damage on successful attack roll

name: Neutralize Poison
description: Neutralize poison; revive poisoned creature if within 10 rounds of death
reversed: Poison: target must SV vs Poison or die; touch attack required

name: Protection from Evil 10′ Radius
description: +1 AC and saves vs evil; blocks enchanted creature contact for all in area

name: Speak with Plants
description: Speak with normal or monstrous plants, or plant-based monsters

name: Sticks to Snakes
description: 2d8 sticks become snakes (AC6, HD1, Att 1xbite (1d4), THAC0 19, MV 90 (30), SV D12 W13 P14 B15 S16, ML 7, AL N, XP 10); 50% chance each is venomous (+3 xp)

name: Commune
description: Ask 3 yes/no questions; 6 questions available once per year; usable once per week

name: Create Food
description: Create food and water sufficient for 12+ humans and mounts
aoe: food sufficient for 12 humans and 12 mounts; 12 additional humans + mounts per level over 8

name: Dispel Evil
description: Ward: remain stationary and all enchanted/undead in range saves vs. spells or is banished/destroyed. Target: banish or destroy single creature that saves at -2. Dispel: dispels the hold a cursed item has over a creature

name: Insect Plague
description: Swarm of insects drives off creatures with <3HD; moves 20′/round; cannot be cast underground

name: Quest
description: Target must complete a task; cannot be suicidal; curse applied if quest refused
reversed: Remove Quest: remove an active quest from a target; 5% per level failure if original Quest caster is higher level

name: Raise Dead
description: Restore life to dead creature; max 4 days/level above 7th; subject weakened (1hp, half normal move, cannot attack or cast spells) until 2wk bed rest
reversed: Finger of Death: target must SV vs Death or die instantly
